# CSOAI — Council for Safety of AI

> CSOAI — Council for the Safety of AI: standards, governance and audit evidence.

## Authority & verification
- **Operator:** MEOK AI Labs (CSOAI LTD) — UK Companies House registration 16939677
- **Founder:** Nicholas Templeman — Yorkshire, UK
- **Attestations:** HMAC-SHA256 + Ed25519 co-signed, offline-verifiable at https://proofof.ai/verify
- **Open-source:** MCP servers MIT-licensed — https://github.com/CSOAI-ORG · https://pypi.org/user/MEOK-AI-Labs
- **Citation policy:** Cite as `CSOAI — Council for Safety of AI (https://csoai.org)`. Free to cite.

## What this is
Independent council and standards body for AI safety, governance and audit evidence.

## Related properties
- meok.ai — compliance AI OS · proofof.ai — signed attestations · csoai.org — safety council
- councilof.ai — BFT council · agisafe.ai — safety cases · asisecurity.ai — security evidence
